title: KFC India Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: KFC India Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, KFC India Global Group in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About KFC India Global Group:
KFC India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India Global Group!
